title: Product Designer (UI/UX)
description:
Duration: 12 months
Salary: Up to S$6,000/month
Work Hours: Mon–Thu 9:00am–6:30pm, Fri 9:00am–6:00pm
Location: Central Region


Seeking an experienced Product Designer to join a digital team focused on delivering high-quality web and mobile experiences. This is a 12-month contract role, offering the opportunity to work on impactful digital initiatives.


Key Responsibilities:
- Design visually appealing and functional user interfaces for web and mobile applications.
- Create high-fidelity mockups, prototypes, and design systems that maintain consistency across products.
- Ensure designs are responsive, accessible, and optimized for different devices and platforms.

- Conduct user research, including interviews, surveys, and usability testing, to understand user needs and behaviours.
- Develop user personas, journey maps, wireframes, and user flows to inform design decisions and enhance the overall user experience.

- Maintain and contribute to design systems, style guides, and component libraries.
- Stay up to date with design trends, tools, and best practices in UX/UI design.
- Ensure all designs comply with accessibility standards and guidelines.

- Work closely with product managers, developers, and stakeholders to translate business requirements into effective design solutions.
- Present design concepts and rationale to cross-functional teams and senior management.
- Participate in design reviews, incorporate feedback, and iterate designs to meet project objectives.

- Collaborate with development teams to ensure design feasibility and proper implementation of UI elements.
- Support the team in documentation, reporting, and other operational tasks as required to ensure smooth project delivery.


Requirements:
- 3+ years of UX/UI design experience with a strong portfolio demonstrating design process and outcomes.
- Proficient in Figma, Sketch, and Adobe Creative Suite.
- Experience with user research methodologies, usability testing, and analytics tools.
- Familiarity with Agile development processes and design thinking methodologies.
- Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams.


This role provides the opportunity to design and deliver meaningful user experiences across web and mobile platforms in a structured, professional environment.

Interested candidates, kindly email your resume to: charmaine.kok@tg-hr.com

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd

(a wholly owned subsidiary of the TG Group)


TG Group (“TG”) is a global workforce solutions provider with an international reach in over 50 markets across the globe. Headquartered in Singapore with Shanghai Foreign Service (Group) Co Ltd ("FSG") as a strategic shareholder, TG delivers a comprehensive suite of innovative human capital solutions to help our clients achieve greater business success.

TG adopts a future-centric approach where we aspire to be at the forefront of the evolution of the future of work. We believe that human capital is the greatest asset to any institution. With a wealth of experience in the Human Resources (HR) industry, we combine our international expertise and local know-how to deliver bespoke and innovative workforce solutions.

Our diverse portfolio of client-centric workforce solutions includes Contingent Workforce Management (CWM), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Permanent Placements, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), Professional Employer Organisation (PEO), and Payroll Process Outsourcing (PPO).
postedCompany.name: APBA TG HUMAN RESOURCE PTE. LTD.
